/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-reorder -Wno-unused-variable -Wtype-limits -std=c++14 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -march=native -mfpmath=sse -mavx2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX -DLV_HAVE_SSE -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE -Werror -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/awgn_channel_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/awgn_channel_test.dir/awgn_channel_test.c.o -o awgn_channel_test  ../../libsrsran_phy.a ../../../common/libsrsran_common.a ../../libsrsran_phy.a /lib64/libmbedcrypto.so -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libfftw3f.so ../../../support/libsupport.a ../../../srslog/libsrslog.a /usr/lib64/libdw.so
